common.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact an administrator.

home.title: An intelligent, bilingual mentorship operating system
home.subtitle: A measurable, AI-assisted mentorship programme built around learning and optimal wellbeing.

preview.subtitle: Advisory preview · admin approves
preview.question: Who should mentor me for a move into operations leadership?
preview.point1: Language-safe: matched EN↔EN within the same cohort.
preview.point2: Scored on competencies, career goals, and 15 yrs of ops experience.
preview.point3: Next action: an admin reviews and approves the pairing.
preview.cta: See the match in the portal

journey.title: One guided path, nine months, every step visible
journey.subtitle: Every mentor and mentee follows the same rail — from profile to certificate — so no one is left wondering what comes next.
journey.showcaseSubtitle: A structured path that takes every mentorship from first profile to final certificate.

features.title: Built for the work, not the demo

matching.title: AI-assisted matching
matching.body: Language-safe pairing scored on competencies, goals and experience — the admin always makes the final call.

bilingual.title: Bilingual everywhere
bilingual.body: Write in English or French. Translate any goal, note or message on demand, with the original always kept.

goals.title: SMART goal coach
goals.body: Turn a vague aim into a measurable goal that your mentor approves in a single step.

sessions.title: Session logging
sessions.body: Capture a session in three fields on your phone; AI drafts the summary and the next agenda.

engagement.title: Clinics & community
engagement.body: Monthly clinics, a bilingual forum and private messaging keep the whole cohort connected.

risk.title: Risk monitor
risk.body: Quietly flags pairs that have gone quiet or goals that have stalled — from metadata, never message content.

closing.title: Ready to continue your journey?
closing.subtitle: Sign in to pick up exactly where you left off.
closing.micro: Bilingual · Secure by design · AI-assisted, human-approved

footer.tagline: Learning and optimal wellbeing through guided mentorship.
footer.privacy: Confidential by design — direct messages stay private to participants.

home.heroSubtitle: A professional mentorship ecosystem designed to bridge knowledge gaps, support wellbeing, and accelerate careers.
home.showcaseSubtitle: A structured path that takes every mentorship from first profile to final certificate.
home.aiPathBody: Based on a mentee profile, the assistant recommends the next best step on the journey — always advisory, the human stays in control.

bento.growthBody: Accelerate your trajectory with personalized roadmaps and milestone tracking built for the enterprise.
bento.knowledgeBody: Tap a deep reservoir of institutional wisdom — seamless transfer of skills from seasoned executives to rising talent.
bento.networkBody: Work in English or French. Translate any goal, note or message on demand, with the original always preserved.

home.cta2Subtitle: Whether you are guiding the next generation or seeking the wisdom to lead, your journey begins here.

about.title: About the programme
about.body: A 9-month bilingual mentorship programme powered by an intelligent, measurable system: pre-training and matching, training, goal setting, mentorship sessions, reviews, clinics, reporting, and completion.
about.ctaBody: Sign in to your account, or request access to join the programme.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most. Can't find yours? Your programme administrator is one message away.
faq.q1: Is the programme available in French?
faq.a1: Yes. The entire interface and your conversations are available in English and French, and you are never forced to write in English.
faq.q2: Who can I contact for help?
faq.a2: Reach out to your programme administrator from within the portal.
faq.helpBody: Sign in and reach out to your programme administrator from within the portal.

tips.tip1: Come to each session with one specific thing you want to work on — it keeps the conversation focused.
tips.tip2: After every meeting, write a short reflection. Small notes add up to a clear picture of your growth.
tips.tip3: Stuck on a goal? Break it into the next single action you can take this week.
tips.tip4: Your mentor's time is a gift — follow up on the actions you agreed, and tell them what worked.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.body: This is your home base. The top button tells you what to do next whenever you're unsure.

steps.title: Meet your mentor
steps.body: Once matched, your mentor appears here. Open your shared workspace to see agreements, goals, and meetings in one place.

steps.title: Set SMART goals
steps.body: Use Goals to draft development goals — the AI Goal Coach can polish them, and your mentor approves them.

steps.title: Meet and reflect
steps.body: Schedule sessions, then log a quick reflection afterwards. The Journal keeps your private notes.

steps.title: Need help?
steps.body: Use the + button for quick actions, and Request Support privately if anything isn't working.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.body: This is your home base. The top button surfaces your most important next action.

steps.title: Your mentees
steps.body: Each mentee has a shared workspace. Open it for their goals, agreements, sessions, and the first-meeting icebreaker.

steps.title: Review goals
steps.body: When a mentee submits a goal, approve it, request changes, or comment from the Goals page.

steps.title: Log sessions
steps.body: After each session, log what you discussed — paste rough notes and let the AI structure them and extract action items.

steps.title: Stay on track
steps.body: The dashboard flags reviews and logs awaiting you. Use the + button for quick actions.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Short guides to get the most from the programme.

matching.title: How matching works
matching.summary: How mentors and mentees are paired.
body: Matching pairs each mentee with a mentor based on language, competencies, career goals, experience, department, and availability.
Language is a hard rule: English speakers are paired with English speakers and French with French — cross-language pairs are never created.
The system suggests and explains pairings, but an administrator reviews and approves every match. You'll be notified when yours is ready, and you can accept it from your dashboard.

goals.title: Submitting goals
goals.summary: Draft, refine, and get goals approved.
body: Open Goals and create a development goal using the SMART fields: what you want to develop, why it matters, your current and desired level, and how success is measured.
The AI Goal Coach can suggest a clearer, more measurable rewrite — it's only a suggestion, you stay in control of what you save.

Submit the goal for your mentor to review. They can approve it, request changes, or comment. Approved goals move through stages from In progress to Achieved, and you can upload evidence along the way.

scheduling.title: Scheduling meetings
scheduling.summary: Plan sessions and confirm they happened.
body: Either you or your partner can schedule a session from Meetings: set a title, type, and time.
When Outlook is connected, the event is added to your calendar automatically.
After a meeting passes, you'll be asked a one-tap question: did it happen? Answering keeps everyone's records accurate.

sessions.title: Logging sessions
sessions.summary: Capture what you discussed and agreed.
body: Mentors log each session from Sessions. You can fill the fields directly, or paste rough notes and let the AI structure them into a clean summary with action items.
Everything the AI produces is an editable suggestion — nothing is saved until you confirm it.
Action items track who does what by when. Mentees can add a private reflection to each session from their side.

journal.title: Journal and private notes
body: Your journal is private by default. Use the prompts to reflect after a session: what you learned, what you'll do next, what challenge remains.
You can choose to share an individual entry with your mentor — and unshare it again at any time.
Mentors have their own private notes per mentee. These are never visible to the mentee or to administrators.

translation.title: Working in English and French
translation.summary: Translate any text, keep the original.
body: You're never forced to write in English. Write in the language you're comfortable with.
Most text areas have a translate toggle to view the content in English or French; the original is always kept.
Translations are saved so the same content is never re-translated.

support.title: Requesting support
body: If something isn't working — you can't reach your partner, you're uncomfortable with the match, or you need help — use Request Support.
Your request is private: it's anonymous to other participants, but the programme team sees it so they can help. It's never shown to your mentor or mentee.
An administrator will respond privately, and you'll see their reply on your support page.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your sessions and programme milestones. Scheduled meetings sync to Outlook when it's connected.
